recommendations.title: Zombeavers
recommendations.overview: College friends find their weekend of sex and debauchery ruined when deadly zombie beavers swarm their riverside cabin.

recommendations.title: Bad Trip
recommendations.overview: In this hidden-camera prank comedy, two best friends bond on a wild road trip to New York as they pull real people into their raunchy, raucous antics.

recommendations.title: So Young
recommendations.overview: Although new friendships and new love await her, a college freshman discovers that university life is not as simple as she had hoped.

recommendations.title: Vamp
recommendations.overview: Two fraternity pledges go to a sleazy bar in search of a stripper for their college friends, unaware it is occupied by vampires.

recommendations.title: Escape from the 21st Century
recommendations.overview: Three friends discover that they have the power to travel back and forth 20 years with a sneeze. However, the future is not as good as they hope, and they need to take on the responsibility of saving the world.

recommendations.title: Bachelor Party
recommendations.overview: On the eve of his wedding to his longtime girlfriend, unassuming nice guy Rick is dragged out for a night of debauchery by his friends.

recommendations.title: I Do...Knot
recommendations.overview: Sebastian is very lucky with women, going to parties and getting drunk every night. His mother asks him to change his way of life but he refuses to stop partying and meeting new women. One day, after one night of serious partying he wakes up with a b

recommendations.title: Incoming
recommendations.overview: Their first week of high school. The biggest party of the year. Mistakes will be made as four teenage boys navigate a night of mayhem and debauchery.

recommendations.title: Less Than Zero
recommendations.overview: A college freshman returns to Los Angeles for Christmas at his ex-girlfriend's request, but discovers that his former best friend has an out-of-control drug habit.

recommendations.title: The Blackwell Ghost
